sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: MORGAN STANLEY의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 총수익은 $20.6 billion로 전년 동기 $17.7 billion 대비 16% 증가해 분기 성장세가 확인됐다.
세전이익 $7.0 billion과 함께 ROE 21.0%, ROTCE 27.1%가 제시돼 수익성과 자본수익성의 동시 개선 흐름을 보여준다.
순이익 applicable은 $5.6 billion, 희석 EPS는 3.43으로 기록돼 이익 창출이 주주지표에 반영됐다.

riskChanges.text: 매출이 10.7 billion인 Institutional Securities 성과에 크게 기대고 있어 Markets·Advisory 여건 변화가 실적 변동성 요인으로 작동할 수 있다.
보상 및 복리후생비가 $8,542 million으로 14% 증가해 비용측 압박이 확대될 여지가 있어 수익성 방어가 리스크 관리 포인트가 된다.
Liquidity and Capital Resources에서 규제요건 항목이 별도 다뤄지고 SCET1 15.1%가 제시된 점은 자본규제 충족이 핵심 경영 리스크임을 시사한다.

businessChanges.text: Institutional Securities는 $10.7 billion net revenues를 달성했으며, Markets 강세와 Advisory 기반 투자은행 수익 증가가 주요 동력으로 제시됐다.
Wealth Management는 $8.5 billion net revenues와 pre-tax margin 30.4%를 기록해 자산관리 수익, 순이자수입, 거래수수료 상승이 동반된 구도를 보였다.
모간스탠리는 Institutional Securities, Wealth Management, Investment Management를 통합 운영(Integrated Firm)해 기업·정부·금융기관·개인 등 다양한 고객군을 포괄하는 구조를 유지한다.

financialHighlights.text: 순이익은 XBRL 기준 55억 6,700만 달러로 집계됐고, 본문에서는 동일 기간 순이익 applicable이 $5.6 billion으로 29% 증가했다고 밝혀졌다.
총자산은 1조 5,814억 1,800만 달러, 현금및현금성자산은 1,335억 2,900만 달러로 3월말 대차대조표 규모와 유동성 여력을 확인할 수 있다.

watchItems.text: 수익의 축이 10.7 billion의 Institutional Securities와 8.5 billion의 Wealth Management에 몰려 있어, 두 부문의 수요·마진 변동이 다음 분기 실적 방향을 좌우할 가능성이 크다.
보상비 8,542 million(14%) 증가로 비용 구조 부담이 커지는 가운데, 비용 효율성의 지속성이 유지되는지가 수익성 트랙의 핵심 관찰 포인트다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2026-03-31 net income = 55억 6,700만 달러 (USD 5.567B; 5,567 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 total assets = 1조 5,814억 1,800만 달러 (USD 1581.418B; 1,581,418 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 cash and cash equivalents = 1,335억 2,900만 달러 (USD 133.529B; 133,529 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.

Management’s Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations Introduction Morgan Stanley is a global financial services firm that maintains significant market positions in each of its business segments—Institutional Securities, Wealth Management and Investment Management. Morgan Stanley, through its subsidiaries and affiliates, provides a wide variety of products and services to a large and diversified group of clients and customers, including corporations, governments, financial institutions and individuals. We operate as an Integrated Firm whereby we serve clients holistically across our business segments. Unless the context otherwise requires, the terms “Morgan Stanley,” “Firm,” “us,” “we” or “our” mean Morgan Stanley (the “Parent Company”) together with its consolidated subsidiaries. See the “Glossary of Common Terms and Acronyms” for the definition of certai

Results of Operations Introduction Morgan Stanley is a global financial services firm that maintains significant market positions in each of its business segments—Institutional Securities, Wealth Management and Investment Management. Morgan Stanley, through its subsidiaries and affiliates, provides a wide variety of products and services to a large and diversified group of clients and customers, including corporations, governments, financial institutions and individuals. We operate as an Integrated Firm whereby we serve clients holistically across our business segments. Unless the context otherwise requires, the terms “Morgan Stanley,” “Firm,” “us,” “we” or “our” mean Morgan Stanley (the “Parent Company”) together with its consolidated subsidiaries. See the “Glossary of Common Terms and Acronyms” for the definition of certain terms and acronyms used throughout this Form 10-Q. A descripti
Liquidity and Capital Resources—Regulatory Requirements” herein. 4 March 2026 Form 10-Q Table of Contents Management’s Discussion and Analysis Executive Summary

Overview of Financial Results Consolidated Results—Three Months Ended March 31, 2026 • The Firm reported net revenues and pre-tax income of $20.6 billion and $7.0 billion, respectively. • The Firm delivered ROE of 21.0% and ROTCE of 27.1% (see “Selected Non-GAAP Financial Information” herein). • The expense efficiency ratio was 65% for the first quarter, demonstrating operating leverage while continuing to invest in our businesses. • At March 31, 2026, the Firm’s Standardized Common Equity Tier 1 capital ratio was 15.1%. • Institutional Securities reported net revenues of $10.7 billion, primarily reflecting strong results in our Markets business and higher Investment Banking revenues driven by Advisory. • Wealth Management delivered net revenues of $8.5 billion and a pre-tax margin of 30.4% reflecting strong Asset management revenues, increased net interest income, and higher Transaction

Net Income Applicable to Morgan Stanley ($ in millions) Earnings per Diluted Common Share We reported net revenues of $20.6 billion in the quarter ended March 31, 2026 (“current quarter,” or “1Q 2026”), which increased by 16% compared with $17.7 billion in the quarter ended March 31, 2025 (“prior year quarter,” or “1Q 2025”). Net income applicable to Morgan Stanley was $5.6 billion in the current quarter, which increased by 29% compared with $4.3 billion in the prior year quarter. Diluted earnings per common share was $3.43 in the current quarter, which increased by 32% compared with $2.60 in the prior year quarter.
